Message Input Tests
Chat User A - Message Input - User cannot send empty messages
Emoji Suggested List - Displays expected data
Chat User A - Message Input - User can type up to 1024 chars on input bar
Emoji Suggested List - Can be closed without choosing suggestion
Emoji Suggested List - Selected emoji is added to input bar
Chat Input Text - Validate texts with ** markdown are sent in bolds
Chat Input Text - Validate texts with __ markdown are sent in bolds
Chat Input Text - Validate users can send messages using the code language markdown
Chat Input Text - Code Markdown - User can copy the message from the code block
Chat Input Text - Validate messages with bold markdowns were received in expected format
Chat Input Text - Validate message with code markdown is received in expected format
Chat Input Text - Validate text starting with https:// is sent as link
Chat Input Text - Validate text starting with www. is sent as link
Chat User - Chat Messages containing links contents on local side
Chat Input Text - Validate messages with links were received correctly
Chat User - Chat Messages containing links contents on remote side
Typing Indicator - Send a long message to trigger typing indicator on remote side
Validate Typing Indicator is displayed if remote user is typing
